channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Reporting From Iran Amid Internet Blackouts: How Journalists Are Adapting
item.description: After Israeli and American strikes killed senior Iranian officials in Tehran, the Iranian government imposed a near-total internet blackout. This move has severely impacted journalists and activists i...

item.title: IPOA Investigates Death of 14-Year-Old Boy in Kisauni Shooting Incident
item.description: The Independent Policing Oversight Authority (IPOA) has launched an investigation into the fatal shooting of 14-year-old Dennis Ringa Swaleh in Kisauni, Mombasa County. The teenager was shot on New Ye...

item.title: Muntinlupa opens interactive road safety park for children
item.description: Muntinlupa has inaugurated the Philippines' first-ever road safety park, designed to educate children about road safety in a fun, interactive way. The park, located in Barangay Tunasan, spans 3,140 sq...

item.title: KSE-100 recovers 5,000 points after historic drop amid geopolitical tensions
item.description: Pakistan’s stock market showed a notable recovery on Tuesday as the KSE-100 index gained 5,159.10 points, closing at 157,132.09. This rebound came right after the biggest single-day decline in the his...
